objects.query: SELECT DoesAutoRenewAssetByDefault, Id, Name, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, SellingModelType, Status FROM ProductSellingModel ORDER BY Name ASC, SellingModelType ASC
SELECT Description, Family, Id, IsActive, Name, ProductCode, StockKeepingUnit, Type FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC

SELECT Id, IsDefault, Product2Id, ProductSellingModelId, Product2.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name, ProductSellingModel.SellingModelType FROM ProductSellingModelOption ORDER BY Product2.StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT CatalogType, Code, Description, EffectiveEndDate, EffectiveStartDate, Id, Name FROM ProductCatalog ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT CatalogId, Code, Description, Id, IsNavigational, Name, ParentCategoryId, SortOrder FROM ProductCategory ORDER BY Catalog.Code ASC, Name ASC
SELECT CatalogId, Id, IsPrimaryCategory, ProductCategoryId, ProductId FROM ProductCategoryProduct ORDER BY ProductCategory.Code ASC, Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC
